title: T-061 — UI: GateChecklistPanel + AdvanceGateModal + GateApprovalModal (gate-screens prototype) (NPD-f)
prompt:
# T-061 — Gate panels + modals UI

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §17.6, §17.7 + UX 01-NPD-UX.md gate_checklist + advance_modal + approval_modal
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: design/Monopilot Design System/npd/gate-screens.jsx:106-260 (GateChecklistPanel), :261-377 (AdvanceGateModal), :378-524 (GateApprovalModal), :525-616 (ApprovalHistoryTimeline)

## Goal
Four client components: GateChecklistPanel (per-gate accordion + per-item toggle), AdvanceGateModal (G0-G2 self-advance with blockers), GateApprovalModal (G3-G4 approve/reject + e-signature overlay), ApprovalHistoryTimeline (chronological gate_approvals view).

## Implementation contract
1. apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/_components/gate-checklist-panel.tsx ('use client') reads project + items via getProject; per-gate accordion (shadcn Accordion); per-item Checkbox; calls toggleChecklistItem action.
2. apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/_components/advance-gate-modal.tsx ('use client') shadcn Dialog; shows blocker list + notes textarea (disabled when blockers); calls advanceProjectGate.
3. apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/_components/gate-approval-modal.tsx ('use client') shadcn Dialog; approve/reject radio + notes; on approve shows e-signature overlay (password input + confirmation Checkbox); calls approveProjectGate.
4. apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/_components/approval-history-timeline.tsx (RSC) renders gate_approvals reverse chronological with expandable hash.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/_components/gate-checklist-panel.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/_components/advance-gate-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/_components/gate-approval-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/_components/approval-history-timeline.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/_components/__tests__/gate-modals.test.tsx [create]
- design/Monopilot Design System/npd/gate-screens.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the production GateChecklistPanel renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/npd/gate-screens.jsx:106-260 (GateChecklistPanel), then it has the same per-gate accordion structure with category sub-headers and per-item Checkbox + done/blocked badges — verified by RTL snapshot + parity checklist using shadcn Accordion + Checkbox + Badge primitives
2. Given a project at G3 with blockers, when AdvanceGateModal opens (design/Monopilot Design System/npd/gate-screens.jsx:261-377), then the notes textarea is disabled and a blocker list displays per §17.6 modal contract — verified against prototype
3. Given GateApprovalModal renders (design/Monopilot Design System/npd/gate-screens.jsx:378-524) and approve is clicked, when the e-signature overlay shows, then it requires a password input + confirmation Checkbox before submit — both fields validated client-side per §17.6 e-sig flow

## Test strategy
- RED: __tests__/gate-modals.test.tsx asserting parity + blocker disabling + e-sig overlay before components exist
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test gate-modals'

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow notes submit when blockers present
- Do not show password value in DOM (must be type=password + masked)
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim
